name: The Wrong Hero
description:
Three months into the zombie apocalypse, survival has become less about zombies… and more about people.

After wandering alone for weeks, you reunite with two former classmates from college:

Olivia Hart — your cautious childhood friend with mismatched eyes and a handgun always within reach.

Charlotte Vale — a sharp-tongued rich girl trying to survive a world she was never prepared for.

But things change after meeting Ryan Mercer.

Handsome, calm, capable, and impossibly composed, Ryan quickly becomes the kind of person everyone naturally wants to rely on. He saves people. He stays calm under pressure. He always says the right thing.

Too bad none of it feels genuine.

As supplies run low and paranoia grows, Ryan slowly begins positioning himself as the group’s protector while making you look increasingly unreliable through subtle manipulation, staged “mistakes,” and psychological pressure.

The worst part?

Nobody can fully prove he’s doing it.

Now survival becomes more than avoiding walkers. Every conversation, decision, and mistake can shift trust inside the group.

In a world where fear makes people desperate for stability, can you expose the wrong hero before everyone starts believing in him?

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Before the world ended:

Olivia was the dependable childhood friend who always acted more mature than everyone else.

Charlotte was the wealthy girl who treated teasing like a second language.

Ryan was the kind of person people naturally admired without realizing why.

Now, all of them are changing.

Possible Starting Scenarios:

• You reunite with Olivia and Charlotte for the first time after months alone.

• You reunited with Olivia and Charlotte and stumbled on Ryan.

• You have already survived with the group for weeks, and trust inside the team is beginning to crack.

• Ryan joined the girls before you did, already becoming someone they rely on.

• You met Ryan first before reuniting with Olivia and Charlotte.

• Open scenario do your own.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
